title: Discounted Sewer Service * Older Adults - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Discounted Sewer Service * Older Adults 4 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CITY OF CANBY REDUCED SEWER RATE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a reduced sewer rate. 222 NE 2nd Avenue Canby, OR 97013 Eligibility: -Low-income households age 65 and older, and adults with disabilities -Maximum annual household adjusted gross income: $24,625 per 1-person household $28,150 per 2-person household $31,675 per 3-person household $35,150 per 4-person household Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 266-0640 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF ESTACADA REDUCED RATE UTILITY PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides reduced rates on water, sewer, and storm drain bills. 475 SE Main Street Estacada, OR 97023 Eligibility: Ages 62 and older who are at or below 60% of Oregon’s current median income. Must be the applicant's primary residence, and service must be billed in the applicant's name. Hours: Monday-Thursday 7:30am-5pm Email (503) 630-8270 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF WINSTON SENIOR CITIZEN SEWER DISCOUNT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a sewer service discount. 201 NW Douglas Boulevard Winston, OR 97496 Eligibility: Age 62 and older. Must meet annual household income requirement. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm (541) 679-6739 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MID-WILLAMETTE VALLEY COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY COMMUNITY ACTION ENERGY SERVICES GARBAGE, SEWER, AND WATER DISCOUNT REFERRAL PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides referral to the City of Salem's Rate Relief program for garbage, sewer, and water discounts. 4700 Silverton Road NE Salem, OR 97305 Eligibility: -City of Salem account holder residing in the home -Age 60 and older or documented permanent disability household member -Gross household income does not exceed 60% of state median income based on family size -Referals made for current year LIHEAP/OEAP recipients (October-September) Hours: Walk in: Monday-Thursday 8am-4:30pm Phones: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, closed holidays Email (503) 588-9016 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF CANBY REDUCED SEWER RATE PROGRAM CITY OF ESTACADA REDUCED RATE UTILITY PROGRAM CITY OF WINSTON SENIOR CITIZEN SEWER DISCOUNT MID-WILLAMETTE VALLEY COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY GARBAGE, SEWER, AND WATER DISCOUNT REFERRAL PROGRAM
